user_query: I want to plan a road trip across the United States and visit famous landmarks. Provide me with a list of cities along the route and their unique histories and touristic AI texts. Also, recommend hotels in each city for my stay during the road trip.

TaskList.description: Determine the route for the road trip across the United States, identifying key cities and landmarks to visit.
Retrieve unique histories and touristic AI texts for each city identified in the route.
Recommend hotels in each city along the route for the stay during the road trip.
